notes: Phase 4 interface layer complete. Implemented API helpers (generateRequestId, successResponse, apiErrorResponse), admin auth middleware (timing-safe API key check), updated all API routes to use standard { success, data, meta } envelope. Created client-side chat API service, useSession hook, and chat component exports. All 6 new test files written covering API routes, admin endpoints, auth middleware, and UI components. Installed @testing-library/react + jsdom and added React plugin to vitest config for JSX support. 308 tests passing, tsc clean, eslint clean.
